who: procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized marketing agencies processing 10–20 invoices/month, maverick buying causes untracked spending. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: maverick buying leading to untracked spending
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on procurement tools
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for procurement managers
try_it: Let users try vendor spending tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the dashboard
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
